package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	grpc "google.golang.org/grpc"
)

// scenario for grpc_context_not_propagated: gRPC handler methods that create new `context.Background()` instead of using the stream/request context
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario410Positive(ctx context.Context, addr string) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {
	_ = context.Background()
	return grpc.Dial(addr)
}
